title: Elon Musk quietly buys a $1 billion gas turbine company to power Grok
summary:
Elon Musk has quietly bought APR Energy, a Jacksonville-based company that operates a fleet of mobile gas and diesel turbines totaling more than 1 GW of generation capacity.

The self-styled champion of a “solar electric economy” now owns a fossil fuel power company — and he’s buying it to feed the electricity-hungry data centers running xAI’s Grok.

title: BYD’s new Qin Max EV with Flash Charging spotted for the first time
summary: The Qin Max is a “completely different new B-segment fast-charging sedan,” according to BYD. Shortly after previewing it for the first time, BYD’s new electric sedan was spotted driving in public.

title: EV prices just fell again – here’s what US buyers paid in June
summary: If you’ve been waiting to buy an EV, the latest Kelley Blue Book June price data may give you another reason to wait a bit longer.

title: Nissan recalls nearly 4,000 new Leaf EVs after CR test finds seat belt issue
summary: Nissan is recalling nearly 4,000 new 2026 Leaf EVs after a Consumer Reports test found the rear seat belt assemblies failed to meet federal requirements.

title: ChargePoint is bringing ultra-fast EV chargers to 12 busy highway travel plazas
summary: ChargePoint and travel plaza chain Onvo plan to install ultra-fast EV chargers at 12 highway locations across Pennsylvania and New York, making EV road tripping a little more convenient.

title: Aptera announces nationwide repair network for its upcoming solar electric car
summary: Aptera has officially announced a repair network partnership which will give owners of its upcoming solar electric car access to thousands of repair shops nationwide.

title: Lucid (LCID) stock halted, crashes 40% on bankruptcy report it denies
summary:
Lucid (LCID) stock was hit with multiple volatility halts and crashed more than 40% on Tuesday after a report claimed the EV maker was weighing Chapter 11 bankruptcy or going private.

Lucid quickly denied the report, calling the speculation “completely false” and pointing to its cash position as evidence it can keep operating well into next year.

title: BYD says demand is ‘booming’ for the new Denza Z EV as global pre-orders top 1,000
summary: The Denza Z is not your average supercar. With three electric motors packing over 1,500 hp combined, it can hit 62 mph in under 2 seconds. Global pre-orders are “booming,” according to BYD, with over 1,000 in five days.

title: Segway Myon smart e-bike first discount to $1,550, ECOVACS Goat O1000 RTK robot mower bundle $699, Lectric, Bluetti, more
summary:
We’ve got exciting news leading our Tuesday Green Deals this week, which is that Segway is offering the very first discount on its 2026 Myon Electric Bike for $1,550. Right behind it, we spotted the ECOVACS Goat O1000 RTK Robot Lawn Mower getting a 36-count extra blade set at its second-lowest $699 price. From there, we have a spotlight on Lectric’s XPeak2 Off-Road e-bike deals with $415 FREE bundles starting from $1,499, the 288Wh Bluetti Elite 30 V2 Portable Power Station down at $219, and a bunch more camping-ready deals, too. As always, you can find all the hangover deals down at the bottom of the page, like yesterday’s ENGWE 150-mile L16 Utility e-bike deals starting from $899, the continuing Segway Xyber e-bike + extra battery bundle, and more.

Head below for other New Green Deals we’ve found today and, of course, Electrek’s best EV buying and leasing deals. Also, check out the new Electrek Tesla Shop for the best deals on Tesla accessories.

title: Toyota is now among the top 5 EV sellers in the US, but it’s still taking its foot off the gas
summary: Toyota’s electric vehicle sales surged 225% in Q2, making it one of America’s top-selling EV brands.

title: 'Completely False': Lucid Denies Report That It's Weighing Bankruptcy After Shares Crash
summary: A report that Lucid was considering bankruptcy triggered a massive selloff and an official denial from the automaker.

title: Nearly 10,000 EVs Were Tested For Battery Degradation. These 2 Models Won Out.
summary: A Swedish analysis of nearly 10,000 battery tests found that two EVs retained more than 97% of their capacity after 62,000 miles.

title: The Company Behind TikTok Could Get Into The Autonomous Car Race: Report
summary: TikTok's parent company is more massive than you might think, it's reportedly eyeing up self-driving.

title: This New EV Range Extender Skips Gas And Packs A New Kind Of Generator
summary: The electric motor on Horse Powertrain’s D20 range extender is smaller and more powerful than conventional generators.

title: This Tiny Electric Kia Camper Somehow Sleeps Four
summary: The PV5 LightCamp packs two beds, a removable kitchen, and rooftop sleeping space into one remarkably compact electric van.

title: California's $3,500 EV Rebate Program Starts 'Later This Summer'
summary: The program, which applies to new and used EVs, fills some of the gap left behind by the now-dead $7,500 EV tax credit.

title: Hyundai's Got An Awesome-Looking $30,000 EV. But It's Not For You
summary: With over 300 miles of WLTP range and charming styling, the Ioniq 3 would be an incredible Chevy Bolt competitor. But we're not that lucky.

title: Apple's Self-Driving Car Program Failed. But It Still Made Your iPhone Better
summary: Apple's self-driving car program failed. But the AI chipsets developed from it help power the iPhones and MacBooks on sale today.

title: After 87,000 Miles, This 2022 Tesla Model Y Didn’t Just Lose Range. It Charges Slower Too
summary: ADAC documented 14% battery-capacity loss and a substantial reduction in peak charging power after 87,000 miles.

title: This Chinese Micro EV Makes The Fiat Topolino Look Bare-Bones
summary: The €8,000 Astraux tiny EV has all the features you would expect to find in an actual car, despite technically not being one.
